classes.Description: A faithful healer who channels holy light to protect allies and banish the undead. Ideal for players who enjoy support roles with a touch of offense.
A raging powerhouse that uses heavy weapons and relentless aggression to cleave through enemies. Thrives on splash range, attack speed, and ramping damage.
A ranged specialist who uses firearms for rapid shots, ricochets, and mobility-based combat. Suited for players who like to kite enemies and strike from a distance with style.
A balanced melee fighter trained in spear and shield combat. Durable and dependable, ideal for players who enjoy frontline roles and absorbing damage.
A student of elemental magic, capable of casting destructive spells from a distance. Ideal for players who enjoy powerful ranged damage and skill timing.
A dark spellcaster who commands the dead and twists life force into weapons. Specializes in summoning undead minions, damage-over-time effects, and overwhelming foes through attrition and sacrifice.
A durable frontline protector who uses holy power to heal allies, draw aggro, and block incoming damage with a shield. Great for party support and sustained defense.

A devoted holy caster focused on healing, protection, and undead suppression. Ideal for players who enjoy keeping allies alive, reinforcing parties with blessings, and punishing dark creatures with sacred power.
A nimble and unpredictable fighter who blends agility, poison, and precision. Ideal for players who enjoy fast-paced, hit-and-run tactics and outsmarting their foes.
A swift ranged fighter who excels at mobility and precision. Perfect for players who prefer kiting, volleys, and striking from afar.
A fast, elusive trickster who uses clones, teleportation, and misdirection to overwhelm enemies. Perfect for players who favor mobility, precision, and outmaneuvering their opponents.
A mystical conjurer who fights alongside summoned companions. Ideal for players who enjoy flexible support, strategic positioning, and empowering allies through magical bonds.
A raw and powerful combatant who wields heavy axes with overwhelming force. Great for players who want high damage, wide attacks, and brutal offense.
A scholar of forgotten techniques who stitches together magic from many paths. Draws upon a broad arsenal of base class skills to adapt to any situation through clever sequencing and hybrid tactics.

A master of pure arcane destruction who channels fire, ice, and lightning into devastating spells. Excels at large-scale AoE damage and battlefield control, rewarding players who plan positioning and cast timing.

Acolyte.name: Heal
Acolyte.description: Channels holy energy to restore health to a target ally.

Acolyte.name: Codex Mastery
Acolyte.description: Boosts magical attack when wielding a book. Increases healing power.

Acolyte.name: Haste
Acolyte.description: A surge of energy rushes through the limbs, quickening reflexes and footwork.

Acolyte.name: Benediction
Acolyte.description: Imbues allies with divine protection, raising all attributes for a time.

Acolyte.name: Faith
Acolyte.description: Strengthens divine conviction, increasing damage against Undead and Shadow foes while reducing harm taken from them.

Acolyte.name: Divine Grace
Acolyte.description: Invokes a holy blessing that increases natural health and mana recovery rate.

Acolyte.name: Sacred Aegis
Acolyte.description: Envelops an ally in divine protection, forming a barrier equal to a portion of their maximum health. The aegis shields them completely from incoming physical attacks until it is broken.

Acolyte.name: Cure
Acolyte.description: Channels purifying energy to dispel harmful afflictions, restoring clarity where corruption once lingered.

Acolyte.name: Holy Light
Acolyte.description: Releases a focused ray of divine energy, dealing holy damage to a single enemy.

Acolyte.name: Arcanum Ward
Acolyte.description: Creates a sacred barrier that absorbs Magic damage, shielding an ally from hostile spells.

Acolyte.name: Resurrection
Acolyte.description: Revives a fallen ally with a portion of their health and spirit restored. Requires strong faith and a long invocation.

Berserker.name: Mighty Roar
Berserker.description: Let out a powerful roar to bolster nearby allies.

Berserker.name: Earth Splitter
Berserker.description: Slam the ground with immense force, staggering enemies and slowing them in the shockwave.

Berserker.name: Dark Claw
Berserker.description: Rip into the target with savage slashes, inflicting bleeding and fueling your rage.

Berserker.name: Wild Charge
Berserker.description: Leap forward with ferocious momentum, crushing enemies on impact and leaving them bleeding.

Berserker.name: Blood Howl
Berserker.description: Unleash a savage howl, feeding allies with bloodlust.

Berserker.name: Furious Shout
Berserker.description: Channel your fury into a battle cry, empowering allies.

Berserker.name: Execute
Berserker.description: Deliver a devastating finishing blow, dealing massive damage.

Berserker.name: Cyclone
Berserker.description: Spin violently while advancing, pulling enemies inward and shredding them with relentless strikes.

Berserker.name: Fearsome Cry
Berserker.description: Terrify nearby enemies with a deafening shout, staggering and stunning them while enraging yourself.

Berserker.name: Berserk
Berserker.description: Power without restraint. Enter a berserk state, greatly enhance combat power.

Berserker.name: Axe Throw
Berserker.description: Hurl your axe in a brutal arc, striking the target twice before it snaps back into your grasp.

Berserker.name: Blood Frenzy
Berserker.description: Violence without pause. Sacrifice control for speed and sustain.

Berserker.name: Increased Regeneration
Berserker.description: Improves natural health recovery over time.

Berserker.name: Blood Crash
Berserker.description: Release stored Rage, instantly healing yourself and regenerating health over time.

Berserker.name: Unyielding
Berserker.description: Consume Rage to steel your body, resisting incoming damage through sheer will.

Gunslinger.name: Suppressive Shot
Gunslinger.description: Pins enemies down with suppressive fire, weakening those caught in the blast.

Gunslinger.name: Piercing Shot
Gunslinger.description: Fires a high-velocity round that pierces through enemies, staggering and knocking them back.

Gunslinger.name: Fan Fire
Gunslinger.description: Rapidly unloads a flurry of shots at a single target.

Gunslinger.name: Jump Shot
Gunslinger.description: Leap into combat and fire mid-air, staggering enemies on impact and opening them up for follow-up attacks.

Gunslinger.name: Explosive Grenade
Gunslinger.description: Hurls an explosive charge that detonates after a short delay, burning enemies in the area.

Gunslinger.name: Poison Grenade
Gunslinger.description: Releases a toxic payload that poisons enemies over time.

Gunslinger.name: Sniper Shot
Gunslinger.description: Channels a devastating precision shot, dealing massive damage to a single target.

Gunslinger.name: Panic Burst
Gunslinger.description: Unleashes a sudden burst of gunfire, damaging enemies in an area and finishing prepared combos.

Gunslinger.name: Gun Mastery
Gunslinger.description: Increases attack power with all firearms and slightly improves attack speed. Allows dual wielding pistols.

Gunslinger.name: Point Blank
Gunslinger.description: Fires a brutal close-range blast, blinding enemies and finishing shotgun combos.

Gunslinger.name: Freeze Grenade
Gunslinger.description: Throws a freezing charge that immobilizes enemies caught in the blast.

Gunslinger.name: Aerial Shot
Gunslinger.description: Leap through the air while firing downward, striking enemies below before landing in an evasive stance.

Gunslinger.name: Flash Bang
Gunslinger.description: Backslide out of danger and prepare a flash grenade, setting up your next move.

Gunslinger.name: Shrapnel
Gunslinger.description: Blasts enemies with shrapnel at close range, slowing and bleeding those struck.

Gunslinger.name: Trigger Happy
Gunslinger.description: Enter a heightened firing state, automatically attacking nearby enemies while in motion.

Gunslinger.name: Lockdown
Gunslinger.description: Brace your weapon and lock your position, unleashing sustained fire with heavy weapons.

Gunslinger.name: Shock Absorber
Gunslinger.description: Reinforce yourself for close combat, reducing incoming impact while wielding shotguns.

Gunslinger.name: Dual Loadout
Gunslinger.description: Allows swapping between equipped gun sets.

Knight.name: Taunt
Knight.description: Forces affected targets to focus all basic attacks on you.

Knight.name: Spear Mastery
Knight.description: Enhances attack power of spears and maces. Increases maximum health.

Knight.name: Shield Mastery
Knight.description: Improves block rate and defences when equipping a shield.

Knight.name: Piercing Flurry
Knight.description: Lunge forward with rapid jabs, striking multiple enemies in a line.

Knight.name: Twohand Parry
Knight.description: Allows two-handed weapons to block attacks.

Knight.name: Impale
Knight.description: Deliver a precise, piercing blow. Deals bonus damage when used at the end of a combo.

Knight.name: Increased Regeneration
Knight.description: Improves natural health recovery over time.

Knight.name: Air Cutter
Knight.description: Sweep your weapon in a swift arc, staggering enemies around you.

Knight.name: Spear Quicken
Knight.description: Increases offensive power when wielding a sword or spear.

Knight.name: Weapon Throw
Knight.description: Hurl your weapon forward in a spinning path, damaging enemies as it returns.

Knight.name: Counter Stance
Knight.description: Take a defensive stance and retaliate with a counter slash when struck.

Mage.name: Wand Mastery
Mage.description: Boosts magical attack when wielding a staff. Increases casting speed.

Mage.name: Earthbolt
Mage.description: Harnesses the pulse of the earth to strike a single foe with crushing, earthen might.

Mage.name: Firebolt
Mage.description: Launches a concentrated flame that scorches a single enemy with fire-element Magic damage.

Mage.name: Thunderbolt
Mage.description: Calls down a high-voltage bolt that strikes a single enemy, dealing wind-element Magic damage.

Mage.name: Icebolt
Mage.description: Hurls a shard of ice to deal water-element Magic damage to a single enemy.

Mage.name: Earth Spikes
Mage.description: The ground erupts in a sudden burst of jagged stone, impaling enemies from below.

Mage.name: Fireball
Mage.description: Casts a fiery orb that explodes on impact, dealing fire damage in an area. Leaves behind a Firewall at the impact zone.

Mage.name: Thunder Storm
Mage.description: Calls down a storm of lightning over a target area, striking all enemies within.

Mage.name: Ice Shard
Mage.description: Fires a fast-moving ice projectile that shatters on impact, damaging and potentially freezing enemies.

Mage.name: Energy Shield
Mage.description: A shimmering barrier hums with arcane force, absorbing harm until its energy fades. Redirects a portion of incoming damage to MP instead of HP.

Mage.name: Free Cast
Mage.description: Allows the caster to move and attack while casting, at the cost of reduced movement and attack speed.

Mage.name: Blink
Mage.description: Instantly teleport to a target location, evading danger and repositioning with precision.

Necromancer.name: Summon Abomination
Necromancer.description: Summons a stitched mass of decaying flesh that controls space through sheer size and presence.

Necromancer.name: Summon Skeleton
Necromancer.description: Raises a Skeleton Soldier to fight at your side, forming the backbone of your undead army.

Necromancer.name: Skeleton Mastery
Necromancer.description: Enhances undead summons, increasing their damage output and resilience.

Necromancer.name: Summon Skeleton Mage
Necromancer.description: Raises a Skeleton Mage that attacks from range with unstable necromantic magic.

Necromancer.name: Summon Wraith
Necromancer.description: Summons an elite undead arcanist that amplifies necromantic power and commands lesser undead.

Necromancer.name: Bone Spear
Necromancer.description: You hurl a sharpened lance of bone, piercing through flesh and spirit alike.

Necromancer.name: Corpse Barrier
Necromancer.description: You bind stolen bone and life into a grim protective barrier that absorbs incoming damage.

Necromancer.name: Scythe Mastery
Necromancer.description: Increases weapon damage when wielding scythes, axes, or swords, and enables life siphoning through melee combat.

Necromancer.name: Bone Spikes
Necromancer.description: Jagged bone spires erupt violently from the ground, impaling enemies caught above them.

Necromancer.name: Death Coil
Necromancer.description: You unleash a coiling strand of undead energy, damaging enemies and healing your summons.

Necromancer.name: Corpse Explosion
Necromancer.description: You violently explode a skeleton summon, scattering necrotic force outward in a lethal detonation. Causes nearby enemies and summons automatically explode on death.

Necromancer.name: Harvest
Necromancer.description: You leap forward in a wide scythe swing, carving through enemies and priming them for a devastating follow-up.

Necromancer.name: Twohand Parry
Necromancer.description: Allows two-handed weapons to block attacks.

Necromancer.name: Reanimation
Necromancer.description: You bind the lingering spirit of a fallen boss to your will, claiming it as an undead champion.

Necromancer.name: Life Drain
Necromancer.description: You siphon vitality from enemies to sustain yourself. When bound to a summon, its aggression surges at the cost of its own life.

Necromancer.name: Death Bond
Necromancer.description: Healing and life-stealing effects are shared between bonded allies.

Necromancer.name: Reap
Necromancer.description: You deliver a merciless finishing strike, siphoning life from enemies.

Necromancer.name: Summon Reanimation
Necromancer.description: You call forth a previously claimed undead champion, returning it to the battlefield.

Necromancer.name: Death Nova
Necromancer.description: You release a burst of decaying energy that erupts outward, rotting enemies caught in the blast.

Necromancer.name: Death Spiral
Necromancer.description: You spin into a violent scythe assault, tearing through everything nearby as necrotic force surges outward.

Necromancer.name: Necrotic Presence
Necromancer.description: An oppressive undead field empowers necrotic attacks and erodes resistance within its reach.

Necromancer.name: Grave Chill
Necromancer.description: A chilling necrotic presence hastens allies while sapping the speed of nearby enemies.

Necromancer.name: Soul Drain
Necromancer.description: A draining aura siphons life from nearby foes, sustaining those who fight within it.

Paladin.name: High Guard
Paladin.description: Enter a steadfast stance, raising your shield high to protect nearby allies from incoming harm.

Paladin.name: Holy Shield
Paladin.description: Bless your shield with divine protection, hardening your defenses against both steel and sorcery.

Paladin.name: Faith
Paladin.description: Strengthens divine conviction, increasing damage against Undead and Shadow foes while reducing harm taken from them.

Paladin.name: Sacrifice
Paladin.description: Offer a portion of your own vitality to channel divine power, converting pain into radiant strength.

Paladin.name: Consecration
Paladin.description: Sanctify the ground in divine light, healing allies and burning foes who stand within its glow.

Paladin.name: Aegis of Light
Paladin.description: Invoke a radiant barrier of faith, blocking all incoming attacks for a short time, for you and nearby allies.

Paladin.name: Shield Bash
Paladin.description: Charge forward with your shield, sending out a shockwave that staggers and stuns nearby enemies.

Paladin.name: Sanctify
Paladin.description: Bless your armor with divine light, transforming your element to Holy.

Paladin.name: Judgement Blade
Paladin.description: Summon a radiant blade that cleaves through foes, dealing holy damage and leaving them slowed and exposed to further strikes.

Paladin.name: Divine Punishment
Paladin.description: Call down a rain of radiant swords from above, piercing the unworthy with sustained holy fury.

Paladin.name: Shield Throw
Paladin.description: Hurl your shield forward, striking multiple enemies as divine light arcs between them before returning to your hand.

Paladin.name: Life Bond
Paladin.description: Link your life to an ally's, taking their wounds upon yourself.

Paladin.name: Grand Cross
Paladin.description: Unleash a radiant cross of holy light that expands outward, purging the battlefield in waves of divine power.

Paladin.name: Defiance Aura
Paladin.description: Radiate unyielding faith that lessens the force of ranged and magical attacks for allies nearby.

Paladin.name: Vitality Aura
Paladin.description: Emit a gentle divine presence that strengthens the body, increasing vitality and restoring health over time.

Paladin.name: Conviction Aura
Paladin.description: Inspire allies with unwavering resolve, increasing their physical and magical strength.

Paladin.name: Gryphon Riding
Paladin.description: Through divine bond and discipline, the Paladin earns the right to ride a holy gryphon. Together, they soar as beacon and blade of the heavens.

Priest.name: High Heal
Priest.description: Channels an intense surge of divine power to fully restore an ally's vitality, at great mana cost.

Priest.name: Salvation
Priest.description: Calls forth celestial light to return all fallen allies to life, restoring a small portion of their strength and spirit.

Priest.name: Mace Mastery
Priest.description: Enhances attack power when using maces. Increases attack speed.

Priest.name: Sanctuary
Priest.description: Raises a sacred tree that blesses the ground around it. Allies within its light steadily recover health, while undead that enter the sanctuary are repelled and harmed by its radiance.

Priest.name: Status Recovery
Priest.description: Channels divine clarity to free an ally from paralysis or frozen bindings, restoring movement and control.

Priest.name: Turn Undead
Priest.description: Attempts to purge undead and shadow-aligned enemies through divine judgment. Chance to deal 777% damage to Undead and Shadow. Chance = 2% per Lv + INT/5 + LUK/5 + MonsterMissingHealth% * 20

Priest.name: Zeal
Priest.description: Inspires an ally with fervent conviction, boosting all damage for a duration.

Priest.name: Damnation
Priest.description: Calls down divine judgment upon the wicked, stripping away their defenses and leaving them vulnerable.

Priest.name: Sacred Ground
Priest.description: Hallow the earth itself, purging corruption and shielding those who stand within the sanctified circle.

Priest.name: Guardian Spirit
Priest.description: Conjures a sacred barrier, shielding allies within from ranged attacks.

Priest.name: Exorcism
Priest.description: Calls down sacred radiance upon an area, banishing cursed beings and striking foes with holy wrath.

Priest.name: Endow Holy
Priest.description: Blesses a weapon with holy light, converting its attacks to Holy element.

Priest.name: Smite
Priest.description: Strikes the target with a blessed blow, dealing holy physical damage and a chance to stun enemies with divine force.

Priest.name: Divinity
Priest.description: Enters a transcendent state of grace, amplifying the priest's healing and protective power for a short duration.

Priest.name: Sacrament
Priest.description: Focuses the priest's will into perfect spiritual clarity, empowering holy spells and cast proficiency.

Priest.name: Fanaticism
Priest.description: Fills the priest with unshakable zeal, each strike grows swifter and more relentless, guided by divine wrath.

Priest.name: Holy Wrath
Priest.description: Unleashes concentrated holy power upon an enemy, dealing heavy damage and inflicting silence and holy vulnerability.

Priest.name: Absolution
Priest.description: Removes all buffs and harmful statuses from the target, returning them to a neutral state.

Rogue.name: Blade Mastery
Rogue.description: Enhances attack power of daggers and swords. Increases attack speed.

Rogue.name: Shadow Step
Rogue.description: Teleports behind a target and strikes.

Rogue.name: Multistrike
Rogue.description: Grant multistrike to your basic attacks.

Rogue.name: Venom Strike
Rogue.description: Strikes a target with a chance to inflict poison

Rogue.name: Cloaking
Rogue.description: Wraps the body in shifting shadows, blending seamlessly with the surroundings. While cloaked, movement is hidden from sight until the veil is broken by attack or skill use.

Rogue.name: Lightning Reflexes
Rogue.description: Movement becomes instinct, action becomes lightning.

Rogue.name: Venom Coating
Rogue.description: A venomous sheen coats the blade, each strike delivering a silent death.

Rogue.name: Blade Dance
Rogue.description: Unleashes a flurry of strikes around you.

Rogue.name: Dual Wield Mastery
Rogue.description: Unlocks the ability to wield a weapon in each hand.

Rogue.name: Haste
Rogue.description: A surge of energy rushes through the limbs, quickening reflexes and footwork.

Rogue.name: Cure
Rogue.description: Channels purifying energy to dispel harmful afflictions, restoring clarity where corruption once lingered.

Scout.name: Steady Hands
Scout.description: Improves control and precision, enhancing dexterity-based actions.

Scout.name: Strafing Volley
Scout.description: Fires a rapid sequence of arrows at a single target.

Scout.name: Precise Aim
Scout.description: Increases attack range and hit rate, enhancing precision with ranged weapons.

Scout.name: Arrow Shower
Scout.description: Fires a flurry of arrows high into the air, raining down over a wide area. Enemies caught within suffer repeated strikes, forcing them to scatter.

Scout.name: Force Shot
Scout.description: A powerful shot that knocks the target back on impact.

Scout.name: Mark Target
Scout.description: Focus your aim on a single enemy, exposing their weak points. The target becomes Marked, reducing its ability to evade and resist critical strikes.

Scout.name: Inner Focus
Scout.description: Heightens awareness and reaction speed, increasing AGI and DEX.

Scout.name: Slow Trap
Scout.description: Unleashes a seeping pool of violet energy that spreads across the ground. Enemies who enter its grasp find their movements dragged and dulled, as though wading through shadowed mire.

Scout.name: Volatile Bolt
Scout.description: An arrow that explodes on impact, dealing area damage around the target.

Scout.name: Sniper's Nest
Scout.description: Take a steady stance and ready your weapon. While Sniper's Nest is active, your attack speed, and power rise, but your movement is hindered.

Shinobi.name: Flame Orb
Shinobi.description: Launch a slow-moving core of condensed energy that threatens the battlefield before rupturing outward on impact, releasing a controlled burst that scorches everything within range.

Shinobi.name: Binding Spiral
Shinobi.description: A spinning technique that drags enemies inward as pressure collapses toward a single point. At the moment of convergence, energy is stripped to zero, freezing all caught at the core.

Shinobi.name: Flash Step
Shinobi.description: Instantly cross space and strike the target's position, committing fully to the engagement and collapsing the distance in a single motion.

Shinobi.name: Fire Release
Shinobi.description: Summons a blazing whale of flame that leaps skyward before crashing down, engulfing enemies in fire.

Shinobi.name: Ice Release
Shinobi.description: Calls forth a spectral pufferfish that spits shards of ice, piercing foes and leaving them slowed.

Shinobi.name: Lightning Release
Shinobi.description: Unleashes a phoenix of lightning that streaks straight ahead, striking through all in its path.

Shinobi.name: Flow State
Shinobi.description: Adopt a disciplined combat rhythm, weaving techniques between strikes. Autoattacks draw on magical power and trigger techniques more frequently, favoring sustained pressure over raw burst.

Shinobi.name: Ninjutsu Mastery
Shinobi.description: Refined control of hidden arts enhances magical output and mana flow, extending the reach and endurance of advanced techniques.

Shinobi.name: Shadow Seal
Shinobi.description: Forms a seal of shadows that splits your presence, summoning multiple clones to fight alongside you.

Shinobi.name: Shadow Mastery
Shinobi.description: Mastery of shadow sharpens instinct and movement, allowing the Shinobi to slip past attacks with speed and uncanny evasions.

Shinobi.name: Silent Edge
Shinobi.description: Enter a lethal stance focused on precision and timing. Critical strikes land harder and more often, rewarding decisive movement and clean execution.

Shinobi.name: Fan Of Knives
Shinobi.description: Scatter a fan of blades in a sweeping arc, leaping through the target's space to evade retaliation while opening enemies to follow-up techniques.

Shinobi.name: Elusive Feint
Shinobi.description: Granting a brief moment of perfect evasion against all attacks, leaving behind a shadowy double as you slide backward out of danger.

Shinobi.name: Twist Of Fate
Shinobi.description: Strike with overwhelming force, stunning and scattering enemies before slipping back into the shadows, readying the next decisive move.

Shinobi.name: Shuriken Fan
Shinobi.description: Hurls a massive enchanted shuriken that spins in place, striking nearby enemies in rapid succession before fading.

Shinobi.name: Mimic Seal
Shinobi.description: Copies the essence of a target's magic, allowing you to cast their spell as your own.

Shinobi.name: Black Blade
Shinobi.description: Launches a whirling blade of darkness that carves toward a target, cutting through with shadow force.

Summoner.name: Summon Angel
Summoner.description: A radiant healer who channels light into soothing magic and soul-searing strikes.

Summoner.name: Summon Cactus
Summoner.description: A spiny sentinel that soaks up hits and punishes attackers without flinching.

Summoner.name: Summon Mastery
Summoner.description: Improves the effectiveness of summoned allies, allowing them to inherit more of your power.

Summoner.name: Summon Cat
Summoner.description: A nimble caster that darts between foes, blasting lightning with wild flair.

Summoner.name: Summon Wolf
Summoner.description: A fast, feral brawler that tears into enemies with raw strength and speed.

Summoner.name: Resonance Well
Summoner.description: A tranquil hum radiates outward, harmonizing body and spirit. Beneath its gentle shimmer, vitality stirs and clarity takes root.

Summoner.name: Suppression Field
Summoner.description: A ghostly presence descends in silence. Within its reach, the air thickens and thought falters, all sound swallowed by stillness.

Summoner.name: Soul Strike
Summoner.description: You form a protective pact with your summon.

Summoner.name: Banishment Field
Summoner.description: Radiant spirits descend in silent judgment, severing the soul from grace. The afflicted find their healing turned against them, their essence exposed to the full weight of Magic assault.

Summoner.name: Dissonance Well
Summoner.description: A field of spiritual interference thrums with jagged tension, stalling thought, movement, and will. Those within find their bodies sluggish, their instincts dulled, as if time itself resists them.

Summoner.name: Conjurer
Summoner.description: A deeper bond with summoned entities and restorative magic.

Summoner.name: Guardian Bond
Summoner.description: You forge a protective link with your summon. Vitality and regeneration flow between you, reinforcing both bodies in quiet resilience.

Summoner.name: Fury Bond
Summoner.description: You bind your spirit to an ally, unleashing a shared surge of ferocity. Both of you strike harder and truer, your blows driven by rising fury.

Summoner.name: Invoker
Summoner.description: Your mastery of spellcasting and summoning sharpens the mind. Empowers your summons to echo Soul Strike, allowing their magic to resonate with your own.

Summoner.name: Summon Command
Summoner.description: Commands all active summons to converge on the chosen enemy or location, forcing them to attack your target.

Summoner.name: Summon Recall
Summoner.description: Calls all active summons back to your side, cancelling their current actions and returning them instantly.

Summoner.name: Summon Swap
Summoner.description: Instantly swaps your active summon configuration, allowing rapid adaptation in combat.

Summoner.name: Summon Mount
Summoner.description: Mount your active summon, taking direct control while remaining able to cast your own abilities and sharing all damage taken. Summon must be at it's final stage.

Warrior.name: Axe Mastery
Warrior.description: Enhances attack power of axes and swords. Improves critical damage.

Warrior.name: Bash
Warrior.description: Delivers a crushing blow with a chance to stun the target.

Warrior.name: Axe Quicken
Warrior.description: Increases offensive power when wielding a sword or axe.

Warrior.name: Stomp
Warrior.description: Slams the ground, stunning enemies in a wide area.

Warrior.name: Twin Cleave
Warrior.description: Swing your weapon twice in wide arcs, cutting down all enemies in front of you.

Warrior.name: Vortex Slash
Warrior.description: Unleashes a powerful spinning slash that damages enemies in a wide area and pulls them toward the caster.

Warrior.name: Whirlwind
Warrior.description: Spin in place, slashing all enemies around you over time.

Warrior.name: Honed Blade
Warrior.description: A life of combat has perfected your edge, each critical strike hits with ruthless efficiency.

Warrior.name: Dual Wield Mastery
Warrior.description: Unlocks the ability to wield a weapon in each hand.

Warrior.name: Natural Resistance
Warrior.description: Countless battles have hardened your body and spirit. Reduces damage from all elements.

Weaver.name: Heal
Weaver.description: Channels holy energy to restore health to a target ally.

Weaver.name: Icebolt
Weaver.description: Hurls a shard of ice to deal water-element Magic damage to a single enemy.

Weaver.name: Firebolt
Weaver.description: Launches a concentrated flame that scorches a single enemy with fire-element Magic damage.

Weaver.name: Weaver Mastery
Weaver.description: A quiet art that intertwines might, mind, and spirit.

Weaver.name: Piercing Flurry
Weaver.description: Lunge forward with rapid jabs, striking multiple enemies in a line.

Weaver.name: Strafing Volley
Weaver.description: Fires a rapid sequence of arrows at a single target.

Weaver.name: Venom Strike
Weaver.description: Strikes a target with a chance to inflict poison

Weaver.name: Haste
Weaver.description: A surge of energy rushes through the limbs, quickening reflexes and footwork.

Weaver.name: Ice Shard
Weaver.description: Fires a fast-moving ice projectile that shatters on impact, damaging and potentially freezing enemies.

Weaver.name: Fireball
Weaver.description: Casts a fiery orb that explodes on impact, dealing fire damage in an area. Leaves behind a Firewall at the impact zone.

Weaver.name: Bash
Weaver.description: Delivers a crushing blow with a chance to stun the target.

Weaver.name: Impale
Weaver.description: Deliver a precise, piercing blow. Deals bonus damage when used at the end of a combo.

Weaver.name: Arrow Shower
Weaver.description: Fires a flurry of arrows high into the air, raining down over a wide area. Enemies caught within suffer repeated strikes, forcing them to scatter.

Weaver.name: Venom Coating
Weaver.description: A venomous sheen coats the blade, each strike delivering a silent death.

Weaver.name: Cure
Weaver.description: Channels purifying energy to dispel harmful afflictions, restoring clarity where corruption once lingered.

Weaver.name: Earthbolt
Weaver.description: Harnesses the pulse of the earth to strike a single foe with crushing, earthen might.

Weaver.name: Thunderbolt
Weaver.description: Calls down a high-voltage bolt that strikes a single enemy, dealing wind-element Magic damage.

Weaver.name: Endure
Weaver.description: Prevents flinching from damage.

Weaver.name: Air Cutter
Weaver.description: Sweep your weapon in a swift arc, staggering enemies around you.

Weaver.name: Blade Dance
Weaver.description: Unleashes a flurry of strikes around you.

Weaver.name: Shadow Step
Weaver.description: Teleports behind a target and strikes.

Weaver.name: Holy Light
Weaver.description: Releases a focused ray of divine energy, dealing holy damage to a single enemy.

Weaver.name: Earth Spikes
Weaver.description: The ground erupts in a sudden burst of jagged stone, impaling enemies from below.

Weaver.name: Thunder Storm
Weaver.description: Calls down a storm of lightning over a target area, striking all enemies within.

Weaver.name: Fortify
Weaver.description: Massively increases defensive capabilities.

Weaver.name: Stomp
Weaver.description: Slams the ground, stunning enemies in a wide area.

Weaver.name: Mark Target
Weaver.description: Focus your aim on a single enemy, exposing their weak points. The target becomes Marked, reducing its ability to evade and resist critical strikes.

Weaver.name: Cloaking
Weaver.description: Wraps the body in shifting shadows, blending seamlessly with the surroundings. While cloaked, movement is hidden from sight until the veil is broken by attack or skill use.

Weaver.name: Soul Strike
Weaver.description: You form a protective pact with your summon.

Weaver.name: Suppression Field
Weaver.description: A ghostly presence descends in silence. Within its reach, the air thickens and thought falters, all sound swallowed by stillness.

Weaver.name: Banishment Field
Weaver.description: Radiant spirits descend in silent judgment, severing the soul from grace. The afflicted find their healing turned against them, their essence exposed to the full weight of Magic assault.

Weaver.name: Natural Resistance
Weaver.description: Countless battles have hardened your body and spirit. Reduces damage from all elements.

Weaver.name: Vortex Slash
Weaver.description: Unleashes a powerful spinning slash that damages enemies in a wide area and pulls them toward the caster.

Weaver.name: Steady Hands
Weaver.description: Improves control and precision, enhancing dexterity-based actions.

Weaver.name: Lightning Reflexes
Weaver.description: Movement becomes instinct, action becomes lightning.

Weaver.name: Benediction
Weaver.description: Imbues allies with divine protection, raising all attributes for a time.

Weaver.name: Resonance Well
Weaver.description: A tranquil hum radiates outward, harmonizing body and spirit. Beneath its gentle shimmer, vitality stirs and clarity takes root.

Weaver.name: Dissonance Well
Weaver.description: A field of spiritual interference thrums with jagged tension, stalling thought, movement, and will. Those within find their bodies sluggish, their instincts dulled, as if time itself resists them.

Weaver.name: Divine Grace
Weaver.description: Invokes a holy blessing that increases natural health and mana recovery rate.

Weaver.name: Whirlwind
Weaver.description: Spin in place, slashing all enemies around you over time.

Weaver.name: Inner Focus
Weaver.description: Heightens awareness and reaction speed, increasing AGI and DEX.

Weaver.name: Dual Wield Mastery
Weaver.description: Unlocks the ability to wield a weapon in each hand.

Wizard.name: Fire Pillar
Wizard.description: Summons a pillar of flame that erupts from the ground, searing enemies caught within its blaze.

Wizard.name: Avatar of Fire
Wizard.description: Assume the Avatar of Fire, embodying living flame. Permanently attunes you to Fire, igniting enemies that strike you and increasing all healing received.

Wizard.name: Chain Lightning
Wizard.description: Unleashes a bolt of lightning that arcs between enemies, chaining to additional targets.

Wizard.name: Meteor
Wizard.description: Calls down a burning mass from the heavens that explodes on impact, reducing the battlefield to ash.

Wizard.name: Tempest
Wizard.description: A furious gale tears across the battlefield, scattering and striking all caught in its path.

Wizard.name: Avatar of Stone
Wizard.description: Assume the Avatar of Stone, anchoring yourself with unyielding earth. Permanently attunes you to Earth, increasing resistances and block.

Wizard.name: Elemental Overload
Wizard.description: Unleashes an overwhelming surge of elemental power, erupting from the ground in a catastrophic blast. Deals massive Magic damage in a vast area and leaves enemies exposed to arcane force. The effect of Elemental Overload is determined by your current elemental attunement.

Wizard.name: Avatar of Storm
Wizard.description: Assume the Avatar of Storm, wreathed in surging wind and lightning. Permanently attunes you to Wind, discharging lightning when struck and increasing movement speed.

Wizard.name: Earthquake
Wizard.description: Shakes the ground with devastating tremors, toppling and stunning all enemies caught in the upheaval.

Wizard.name: Blizzard
Wizard.description: Unleashes a flurry of jagged ice, freezing and battering enemies in its wake.

Wizard.name: Earth Wall
Wizard.description: Raises a wall of solid stone from the ground, obstructing foes and shaping the battlefield.

Wizard.name: Avatar of Frost
Wizard.description: Assume the Avatar of Frost, cloaking yourself in bitter cold. Permanently attunes you to Water, freezing attackers and greatly increasing mana regeneration.

Wizard.name: Hydro Vortex
Wizard.description: Unleashes a violent spiral of water, dragging enemies into its raging current.

Wizard.name: Arcane Sigil
Wizard.description: Pushes your casting beyond safe limits, greatly increasing magic damage and cast speed at the cost of doubled mana consumption.

heal.name: Heal
heal.description: Channels holy energy to restore health to a target ally.

codex-mastery.name: Codex Mastery
codex-mastery.description: Boosts magical attack when wielding a book. Increases healing power.

haste.name: Haste
haste.description: A surge of energy rushes through the limbs, quickening reflexes and footwork.

benediction.name: Benediction
benediction.description: Imbues allies with divine protection, raising all attributes for a time.

faith.name: Faith
faith.description: Strengthens divine conviction, increasing damage against Undead and Shadow foes while reducing harm taken from them.

divine-grace.name: Divine Grace
divine-grace.description: Invokes a holy blessing that increases natural health and mana recovery rate.

sacred-aegis.name: Sacred Aegis
sacred-aegis.description: Envelops an ally in divine protection, forming a barrier equal to a portion of their maximum health. The aegis shields them completely from incoming physical attacks until it is broken.

cure.name: Cure
cure.description: Channels purifying energy to dispel harmful afflictions, restoring clarity where corruption once lingered.

holy-light.name: Holy Light
holy-light.description: Releases a focused ray of divine energy, dealing holy damage to a single enemy.

arcanum-ward.name: Arcanum Ward
arcanum-ward.description: Creates a sacred barrier that absorbs Magic damage, shielding an ally from hostile spells.

resurrection.name: Resurrection
resurrection.description: Revives a fallen ally with a portion of their health and spirit restored. Requires strong faith and a long invocation.

mighty-roar.name: Mighty Roar
mighty-roar.description: Let out a powerful roar to bolster nearby allies.

earth-splitter.name: Earth Splitter
earth-splitter.description: Slam the ground with immense force, staggering enemies and slowing them in the shockwave.

dark-claw.name: Dark Claw
dark-claw.description: Rip into the target with savage slashes, inflicting bleeding and fueling your rage.

wild-charge.name: Wild Charge
wild-charge.description: Leap forward with ferocious momentum, crushing enemies on impact and leaving them bleeding.

blood-howl.name: Blood Howl
blood-howl.description: Unleash a savage howl, feeding allies with bloodlust.

furious-shout.name: Furious Shout
furious-shout.description: Channel your fury into a battle cry, empowering allies.

execute.name: Execute
execute.description: Deliver a devastating finishing blow, dealing massive damage.

cyclone.name: Cyclone
cyclone.description: Spin violently while advancing, pulling enemies inward and shredding them with relentless strikes.

fearsome-cry.name: Fearsome Cry
fearsome-cry.description: Terrify nearby enemies with a deafening shout, staggering and stunning them while enraging yourself.

berserk.name: Berserk
berserk.description: Power without restraint. Enter a berserk state, greatly enhance combat power.

axe-throw.name: Axe Throw
axe-throw.description: Hurl your axe in a brutal arc, striking the target twice before it snaps back into your grasp.

blood-frenzy.name: Blood Frenzy
blood-frenzy.description: Violence without pause. Sacrifice control for speed and sustain.

increased-regeneration.name: Increased Regeneration
increased-regeneration.description: Improves natural health recovery over time.

blood-crash.name: Blood Crash
blood-crash.description: Release stored Rage, instantly healing yourself and regenerating health over time.

unyielding.name: Unyielding
unyielding.description: Consume Rage to steel your body, resisting incoming damage through sheer will.

suppressive-shot.name: Suppressive Shot
suppressive-shot.description: Pins enemies down with suppressive fire, weakening those caught in the blast.

piercing-shot.name: Piercing Shot
piercing-shot.description: Fires a high-velocity round that pierces through enemies, staggering and knocking them back.

fan-fire.name: Fan Fire
fan-fire.description: Rapidly unloads a flurry of shots at a single target.

jump-shot.name: Jump Shot
jump-shot.description: Leap into combat and fire mid-air, staggering enemies on impact and opening them up for follow-up attacks.

explosive-grenade.name: Explosive Grenade
explosive-grenade.description: Hurls an explosive charge that detonates after a short delay, burning enemies in the area.

poison-grenade.name: Poison Grenade
poison-grenade.description: Releases a toxic payload that poisons enemies over time.

sniper-shot.name: Sniper Shot
sniper-shot.description: Channels a devastating precision shot, dealing massive damage to a single target.

panic-burst.name: Panic Burst
panic-burst.description: Unleashes a sudden burst of gunfire, damaging enemies in an area and finishing prepared combos.

gun-mastery.name: Gun Mastery
gun-mastery.description: Increases attack power with all firearms and slightly improves attack speed. Allows dual wielding pistols.

point-blank.name: Point Blank
point-blank.description: Fires a brutal close-range blast, blinding enemies and finishing shotgun combos.

freeze-grenade.name: Freeze Grenade
freeze-grenade.description: Throws a freezing charge that immobilizes enemies caught in the blast.

aerial-shot.name: Aerial Shot
aerial-shot.description: Leap through the air while firing downward, striking enemies below before landing in an evasive stance.

flash-bang.name: Flash Bang
flash-bang.description: Backslide out of danger and prepare a flash grenade, setting up your next move.

shrapnel.name: Shrapnel
shrapnel.description: Blasts enemies with shrapnel at close range, slowing and bleeding those struck.

trigger-happy.name: Trigger Happy
trigger-happy.description: Enter a heightened firing state, automatically attacking nearby enemies while in motion.

lockdown.name: Lockdown
lockdown.description: Brace your weapon and lock your position, unleashing sustained fire with heavy weapons.

shock-absorber.name: Shock Absorber
shock-absorber.description: Reinforce yourself for close combat, reducing incoming impact while wielding shotguns.

dual-loadout.name: Dual Loadout
dual-loadout.description: Allows swapping between equipped gun sets.

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.description: Forces affected targets to focus all basic attacks on you.

spear-mastery.name: Spear Mastery
spear-mastery.description: Enhances attack power of spears and maces. Increases maximum health.

shield-mastery.name: Shield Mastery
shield-mastery.description: Improves block rate and defences when equipping a shield.

piercing-flurry.name: Piercing Flurry
piercing-flurry.description: Lunge forward with rapid jabs, striking multiple enemies in a line.

twohand-parry.name: Twohand Parry
twohand-parry.description: Allows two-handed weapons to block attacks.

impale.name: Impale
impale.description: Deliver a precise, piercing blow. Deals bonus damage when used at the end of a combo.

air-cutter.name: Air Cutter
air-cutter.description: Sweep your weapon in a swift arc, staggering enemies around you.

spear-quicken.name: Spear Quicken
spear-quicken.description: Increases offensive power when wielding a sword or spear.

weapon-throw.name: Weapon Throw
weapon-throw.description: Hurl your weapon forward in a spinning path, damaging enemies as it returns.

counter-stance.name: Counter Stance
counter-stance.description: Take a defensive stance and retaliate with a counter slash when struck.

wand-mastery.name: Wand Mastery
wand-mastery.description: Boosts magical attack when wielding a staff. Increases casting speed.

earthbolt.name: Earthbolt
earthbolt.description: Harnesses the pulse of the earth to strike a single foe with crushing, earthen might.

firebolt.name: Firebolt
firebolt.description: Launches a concentrated flame that scorches a single enemy with fire-element Magic damage.

thunderbolt.name: Thunderbolt
thunderbolt.description: Calls down a high-voltage bolt that strikes a single enemy, dealing wind-element Magic damage.

icebolt.name: Icebolt
icebolt.description: Hurls a shard of ice to deal water-element Magic damage to a single enemy.

earth-spikes.name: Earth Spikes
earth-spikes.description: The ground erupts in a sudden burst of jagged stone, impaling enemies from below.

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.description: Casts a fiery orb that explodes on impact, dealing fire damage in an area. Leaves behind a Firewall at the impact zone.

thunder-storm.name: Thunder Storm
thunder-storm.description: Calls down a storm of lightning over a target area, striking all enemies within.

ice-shard.name: Ice Shard
ice-shard.description: Fires a fast-moving ice projectile that shatters on impact, damaging and potentially freezing enemies.

energy-shield.name: Energy Shield
energy-shield.description: A shimmering barrier hums with arcane force, absorbing harm until its energy fades. Redirects a portion of incoming damage to MP instead of HP.

free-cast.name: Free Cast
free-cast.description: Allows the caster to move and attack while casting, at the cost of reduced movement and attack speed.

blink.name: Blink
blink.description: Instantly teleport to a target location, evading danger and repositioning with precision.

summon-abomination.name: Summon Abomination
summon-abomination.description: Summons a stitched mass of decaying flesh that controls space through sheer size and presence.

summon-skeleton.name: Summon Skeleton
summon-skeleton.description: Raises a Skeleton Soldier to fight at your side, forming the backbone of your undead army.

skeleton-mastery.name: Skeleton Mastery
skeleton-mastery.description: Enhances undead summons, increasing their damage output and resilience.

summon-skeleton-mage.name: Summon Skeleton Mage
summon-skeleton-mage.description: Raises a Skeleton Mage that attacks from range with unstable necromantic magic.

summon-wraith.name: Summon Wraith
summon-wraith.description: Summons an elite undead arcanist that amplifies necromantic power and commands lesser undead.

bone-spear.name: Bone Spear
bone-spear.description: You hurl a sharpened lance of bone, piercing through flesh and spirit alike.

corpse-barrier.name: Corpse Barrier
corpse-barrier.description: You bind stolen bone and life into a grim protective barrier that absorbs incoming damage.

scythe-mastery.name: Scythe Mastery
scythe-mastery.description: Increases weapon damage when wielding scythes, axes, or swords, and enables life siphoning through melee combat.

bone-spikes.name: Bone Spikes
bone-spikes.description: Jagged bone spires erupt violently from the ground, impaling enemies caught above them.

death-coil.name: Death Coil
death-coil.description: You unleash a coiling strand of undead energy, damaging enemies and healing your summons.

corpse-explosion.name: Corpse Explosion
corpse-explosion.description: You violently explode a skeleton summon, scattering necrotic force outward in a lethal detonation. Causes nearby enemies and summons automatically explode on death.

harvest.name: Harvest
harvest.description: You leap forward in a wide scythe swing, carving through enemies and priming them for a devastating follow-up.

reanimation.name: Reanimation
reanimation.description: You bind the lingering spirit of a fallen boss to your will, claiming it as an undead champion.

life-drain.name: Life Drain
life-drain.description: You siphon vitality from enemies to sustain yourself. When bound to a summon, its aggression surges at the cost of its own life.

death-bond.name: Death Bond
death-bond.description: Healing and life-stealing effects are shared between bonded allies.

reap.name: Reap
reap.description: You deliver a merciless finishing strike, siphoning life from enemies.

summon-reanimation.name: Summon Reanimation
summon-reanimation.description: You call forth a previously claimed undead champion, returning it to the battlefield.

death-nova.name: Death Nova
death-nova.description: You release a burst of decaying energy that erupts outward, rotting enemies caught in the blast.

death-spiral.name: Death Spiral
death-spiral.description: You spin into a violent scythe assault, tearing through everything nearby as necrotic force surges outward.

necrotic-presence.name: Necrotic Presence
necrotic-presence.description: An oppressive undead field empowers necrotic attacks and erodes resistance within its reach.

grave-chill.name: Grave Chill
grave-chill.description: A chilling necrotic presence hastens allies while sapping the speed of nearby enemies.

soul-drain.name: Soul Drain
soul-drain.description: A draining aura siphons life from nearby foes, sustaining those who fight within it.

high-guard.name: High Guard
high-guard.description: Enter a steadfast stance, raising your shield high to protect nearby allies from incoming harm.

holy-shield.name: Holy Shield
holy-shield.description: Bless your shield with divine protection, hardening your defenses against both steel and sorcery.

sacrifice.name: Sacrifice
sacrifice.description: Offer a portion of your own vitality to channel divine power, converting pain into radiant strength.

consecration.name: Consecration
consecration.description: Sanctify the ground in divine light, healing allies and burning foes who stand within its glow.

aegis-of-light.name: Aegis of Light
aegis-of-light.description: Invoke a radiant barrier of faith, blocking all incoming attacks for a short time, for you and nearby allies.

shield-bash.name: Shield Bash
shield-bash.description: Charge forward with your shield, sending out a shockwave that staggers and stuns nearby enemies.

sanctify.name: Sanctify
sanctify.description: Bless your armor with divine light, transforming your element to Holy.

judgement-blade.name: Judgement Blade
judgement-blade.description: Summon a radiant blade that cleaves through foes, dealing holy damage and leaving them slowed and exposed to further strikes.

divine-punishment.name: Divine Punishment
divine-punishment.description: Call down a rain of radiant swords from above, piercing the unworthy with sustained holy fury.

shield-throw.name: Shield Throw
shield-throw.description: Hurl your shield forward, striking multiple enemies as divine light arcs between them before returning to your hand.

life-bond.name: Life Bond
life-bond.description: Link your life to an ally's, taking their wounds upon yourself.

grand-cross.name: Grand Cross
grand-cross.description: Unleash a radiant cross of holy light that expands outward, purging the battlefield in waves of divine power.

defiance-aura.name: Defiance Aura
defiance-aura.description: Radiate unyielding faith that lessens the force of ranged and magical attacks for allies nearby.

vitality-aura.name: Vitality Aura
vitality-aura.description: Emit a gentle divine presence that strengthens the body, increasing vitality and restoring health over time.

conviction-aura.name: Conviction Aura
conviction-aura.description: Inspire allies with unwavering resolve, increasing their physical and magical strength.

gryphon-riding.name: Gryphon Riding
gryphon-riding.description: Through divine bond and discipline, the Paladin earns the right to ride a holy gryphon. Together, they soar as beacon and blade of the heavens.

high-heal.name: High Heal
high-heal.description: Channels an intense surge of divine power to fully restore an ally's vitality, at great mana cost.

salvation.name: Salvation
salvation.description: Calls forth celestial light to return all fallen allies to life, restoring a small portion of their strength and spirit.

mace-mastery.name: Mace Mastery
mace-mastery.description: Enhances attack power when using maces. Increases attack speed.

sanctuary.name: Sanctuary
sanctuary.description: Raises a sacred tree that blesses the ground around it. Allies within its light steadily recover health, while undead that enter the sanctuary are repelled and harmed by its radiance.

status-recovery.name: Status Recovery
status-recovery.description: Channels divine clarity to free an ally from paralysis or frozen bindings, restoring movement and control.

turn-undead.name: Turn Undead
turn-undead.description: Attempts to purge undead and shadow-aligned enemies through divine judgment. Chance to deal 777% damage to Undead and Shadow. Chance = 2% per Lv + INT/5 + LUK/5 + MonsterMissingHealth% * 20

zeal.name: Zeal
zeal.description: Inspires an ally with fervent conviction, boosting all damage for a duration.

damnation.name: Damnation
damnation.description: Calls down divine judgment upon the wicked, stripping away their defenses and leaving them vulnerable.

sacred-ground.name: Sacred Ground
sacred-ground.description: Hallow the earth itself, purging corruption and shielding those who stand within the sanctified circle.

guardian-spirit.name: Guardian Spirit
guardian-spirit.description: Conjures a sacred barrier, shielding allies within from ranged attacks.

exorcism.name: Exorcism
exorcism.description: Calls down sacred radiance upon an area, banishing cursed beings and striking foes with holy wrath.

endow-holy.name: Endow Holy
endow-holy.description: Blesses a weapon with holy light, converting its attacks to Holy element.

smite.name: Smite
smite.description: Strikes the target with a blessed blow, dealing holy physical damage and a chance to stun enemies with divine force.

divinity.name: Divinity
divinity.description: Enters a transcendent state of grace, amplifying the priest's healing and protective power for a short duration.

sacrament.name: Sacrament
sacrament.description: Focuses the priest's will into perfect spiritual clarity, empowering holy spells and cast proficiency.

fanaticism.name: Fanaticism
fanaticism.description: Fills the priest with unshakable zeal, each strike grows swifter and more relentless, guided by divine wrath.

holy-wrath.name: Holy Wrath
holy-wrath.description: Unleashes concentrated holy power upon an enemy, dealing heavy damage and inflicting silence and holy vulnerability.

absolution.name: Absolution
absolution.description: Removes all buffs and harmful statuses from the target, returning them to a neutral state.

blade-mastery.name: Blade Mastery
blade-mastery.description: Enhances attack power of daggers and swords. Increases attack speed.

shadow-step.name: Shadow Step
shadow-step.description: Teleports behind a target and strikes.

multistrike.name: Multistrike
multistrike.description: Grant multistrike to your basic attacks.

venom-strike.name: Venom Strike
venom-strike.description: Strikes a target with a chance to inflict poison

cloaking.name: Cloaking
cloaking.description: Wraps the body in shifting shadows, blending seamlessly with the surroundings. While cloaked, movement is hidden from sight until the veil is broken by attack or skill use.

lightning-reflexes.name: Lightning Reflexes
lightning-reflexes.description: Movement becomes instinct, action becomes lightning.

venom-coating.name: Venom Coating
venom-coating.description: A venomous sheen coats the blade, each strike delivering a silent death.

blade-dance.name: Blade Dance
blade-dance.description: Unleashes a flurry of strikes around you.

dual-wield-mastery.name: Dual Wield Mastery
dual-wield-mastery.description: Unlocks the ability to wield a weapon in each hand.

steady-hands.name: Steady Hands
steady-hands.description: Improves control and precision, enhancing dexterity-based actions.

strafing-volley.name: Strafing Volley
strafing-volley.description: Fires a rapid sequence of arrows at a single target.

precise-aim.name: Precise Aim
precise-aim.description: Increases attack range and hit rate, enhancing precision with ranged weapons.

arrow-shower.name: Arrow Shower
arrow-shower.description: Fires a flurry of arrows high into the air, raining down over a wide area. Enemies caught within suffer repeated strikes, forcing them to scatter.

force-shot.name: Force Shot
force-shot.description: A powerful shot that knocks the target back on impact.

mark-target.name: Mark Target
mark-target.description: Focus your aim on a single enemy, exposing their weak points. The target becomes Marked, reducing its ability to evade and resist critical strikes.

inner-focus.name: Inner Focus
inner-focus.description: Heightens awareness and reaction speed, increasing AGI and DEX.

slow-trap.name: Slow Trap
slow-trap.description: Unleashes a seeping pool of violet energy that spreads across the ground. Enemies who enter its grasp find their movements dragged and dulled, as though wading through shadowed mire.

volatile-bolt.name: Volatile Bolt
volatile-bolt.description: An arrow that explodes on impact, dealing area damage around the target.

sniper's-nest.name: Sniper's Nest
sniper's-nest.description: Take a steady stance and ready your weapon. While Sniper's Nest is active, your attack speed, and power rise, but your movement is hindered.

flame-orb.name: Flame Orb
flame-orb.description: Launch a slow-moving core of condensed energy that threatens the battlefield before rupturing outward on impact, releasing a controlled burst that scorches everything within range.

binding-spiral.name: Binding Spiral
binding-spiral.description: A spinning technique that drags enemies inward as pressure collapses toward a single point. At the moment of convergence, energy is stripped to zero, freezing all caught at the core.

flash-step.name: Flash Step
flash-step.description: Instantly cross space and strike the target's position, committing fully to the engagement and collapsing the distance in a single motion.

fire-release.name: Fire Release
fire-release.description: Summons a blazing whale of flame that leaps skyward before crashing down, engulfing enemies in fire.

ice-release.name: Ice Release
ice-release.description: Calls forth a spectral pufferfish that spits shards of ice, piercing foes and leaving them slowed.

lightning-release.name: Lightning Release
lightning-release.description: Unleashes a phoenix of lightning that streaks straight ahead, striking through all in its path.

flow-state.name: Flow State
flow-state.description: Adopt a disciplined combat rhythm, weaving techniques between strikes. Autoattacks draw on magical power and trigger techniques more frequently, favoring sustained pressure over raw burst.

ninjutsu-mastery.name: Ninjutsu Mastery
ninjutsu-mastery.description: Refined control of hidden arts enhances magical output and mana flow, extending the reach and endurance of advanced techniques.

shadow-seal.name: Shadow Seal
shadow-seal.description: Forms a seal of shadows that splits your presence, summoning multiple clones to fight alongside you.

shadow-mastery.name: Shadow Mastery
shadow-mastery.description: Mastery of shadow sharpens instinct and movement, allowing the Shinobi to slip past attacks with speed and uncanny evasions.

silent-edge.name: Silent Edge
silent-edge.description: Enter a lethal stance focused on precision and timing. Critical strikes land harder and more often, rewarding decisive movement and clean execution.

fan-of-knives.name: Fan Of Knives
fan-of-knives.description: Scatter a fan of blades in a sweeping arc, leaping through the target's space to evade retaliation while opening enemies to follow-up techniques.

elusive-feint.name: Elusive Feint
elusive-feint.description: Granting a brief moment of perfect evasion against all attacks, leaving behind a shadowy double as you slide backward out of danger.

twist-of-fate.name: Twist Of Fate
twist-of-fate.description: Strike with overwhelming force, stunning and scattering enemies before slipping back into the shadows, readying the next decisive move.

shuriken-fan.name: Shuriken Fan
shuriken-fan.description: Hurls a massive enchanted shuriken that spins in place, striking nearby enemies in rapid succession before fading.

mimic-seal.name: Mimic Seal
mimic-seal.description: Copies the essence of a target's magic, allowing you to cast their spell as your own.

black-blade.name: Black Blade
black-blade.description: Launches a whirling blade of darkness that carves toward a target, cutting through with shadow force.

summon-angel.name: Summon Angel
summon-angel.description: A radiant healer who channels light into soothing magic and soul-searing strikes.

summon-cactus.name: Summon Cactus
summon-cactus.description: A spiny sentinel that soaks up hits and punishes attackers without flinching.

summon-mastery.name: Summon Mastery
summon-mastery.description: Improves the effectiveness of summoned allies, allowing them to inherit more of your power.

summon-cat.name: Summon Cat
summon-cat.description: A nimble caster that darts between foes, blasting lightning with wild flair.

summon-wolf.name: Summon Wolf
summon-wolf.description: A fast, feral brawler that tears into enemies with raw strength and speed.

resonance-well.name: Resonance Well
resonance-well.description: A tranquil hum radiates outward, harmonizing body and spirit. Beneath its gentle shimmer, vitality stirs and clarity takes root.

suppression-field.name: Suppression Field
suppression-field.description: A ghostly presence descends in silence. Within its reach, the air thickens and thought falters, all sound swallowed by stillness.

soul-strike.name: Soul Strike
soul-strike.description: You form a protective pact with your summon.

banishment-field.name: Banishment Field
banishment-field.description: Radiant spirits descend in silent judgment, severing the soul from grace. The afflicted find their healing turned against them, their essence exposed to the full weight of Magic assault.

dissonance-well.name: Dissonance Well
dissonance-well.description: A field of spiritual interference thrums with jagged tension, stalling thought, movement, and will. Those within find their bodies sluggish, their instincts dulled, as if time itself resists them.

conjurer.name: Conjurer
conjurer.description: A deeper bond with summoned entities and restorative magic.

guardian-bond.name: Guardian Bond
guardian-bond.description: You forge a protective link with your summon. Vitality and regeneration flow between you, reinforcing both bodies in quiet resilience.

fury-bond.name: Fury Bond
fury-bond.description: You bind your spirit to an ally, unleashing a shared surge of ferocity. Both of you strike harder and truer, your blows driven by rising fury.

invoker.name: Invoker
invoker.description: Your mastery of spellcasting and summoning sharpens the mind. Empowers your summons to echo Soul Strike, allowing their magic to resonate with your own.

summon-command.name: Summon Command
summon-command.description: Commands all active summons to converge on the chosen enemy or location, forcing them to attack your target.

summon-recall.name: Summon Recall
summon-recall.description: Calls all active summons back to your side, cancelling their current actions and returning them instantly.

summon-swap.name: Summon Swap
summon-swap.description: Instantly swaps your active summon configuration, allowing rapid adaptation in combat.

summon-mount.name: Summon Mount
summon-mount.description: Mount your active summon, taking direct control while remaining able to cast your own abilities and sharing all damage taken. Summon must be at it's final stage.

axe-mastery.name: Axe Mastery
axe-mastery.description: Enhances attack power of axes and swords. Improves critical damage.

bash.name: Bash
bash.description: Delivers a crushing blow with a chance to stun the target.

axe-quicken.name: Axe Quicken
axe-quicken.description: Increases offensive power when wielding a sword or axe.

stomp.name: Stomp
stomp.description: Slams the ground, stunning enemies in a wide area.

twin-cleave.name: Twin Cleave
twin-cleave.description: Swing your weapon twice in wide arcs, cutting down all enemies in front of you.

vortex-slash.name: Vortex Slash
vortex-slash.description: Unleashes a powerful spinning slash that damages enemies in a wide area and pulls them toward the caster.

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
whirlwind.description: Spin in place, slashing all enemies around you over time.

honed-blade.name: Honed Blade
honed-blade.description: A life of combat has perfected your edge, each critical strike hits with ruthless efficiency.

natural-resistance.name: Natural Resistance
natural-resistance.description: Countless battles have hardened your body and spirit. Reduces damage from all elements.

weaver-mastery.name: Weaver Mastery
weaver-mastery.description: A quiet art that intertwines might, mind, and spirit.

fire-pillar.name: Fire Pillar
fire-pillar.description: Summons a pillar of flame that erupts from the ground, searing enemies caught within its blaze.

avatar-of-fire.name: Avatar of Fire
avatar-of-fire.description: Assume the Avatar of Fire, embodying living flame. Permanently attunes you to Fire, igniting enemies that strike you and increasing all healing received.

chain-lightning.name: Chain Lightning
chain-lightning.description: Unleashes a bolt of lightning that arcs between enemies, chaining to additional targets.

meteor.name: Meteor
meteor.description: Calls down a burning mass from the heavens that explodes on impact, reducing the battlefield to ash.

tempest.name: Tempest
tempest.description: A furious gale tears across the battlefield, scattering and striking all caught in its path.

avatar-of-stone.name: Avatar of Stone
avatar-of-stone.description: Assume the Avatar of Stone, anchoring yourself with unyielding earth. Permanently attunes you to Earth, increasing resistances and block.

elemental-overload.name: Elemental Overload
elemental-overload.description: Unleashes an overwhelming surge of elemental power, erupting from the ground in a catastrophic blast. Deals massive Magic damage in a vast area and leaves enemies exposed to arcane force. The effect of Elemental Overload is determined by your current elemental attunement.

avatar-of-storm.name: Avatar of Storm
avatar-of-storm.description: Assume the Avatar of Storm, wreathed in surging wind and lightning. Permanently attunes you to Wind, discharging lightning when struck and increasing movement speed.

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.description: Shakes the ground with devastating tremors, toppling and stunning all enemies caught in the upheaval.

blizzard.name: Blizzard
blizzard.description: Unleashes a flurry of jagged ice, freezing and battering enemies in its wake.

earth-wall.name: Earth Wall
earth-wall.description: Raises a wall of solid stone from the ground, obstructing foes and shaping the battlefield.

avatar-of-frost.name: Avatar of Frost
avatar-of-frost.description: Assume the Avatar of Frost, cloaking yourself in bitter cold. Permanently attunes you to Water, freezing attackers and greatly increasing mana regeneration.

hydro-vortex.name: Hydro Vortex
hydro-vortex.description: Unleashes a violent spiral of water, dragging enemies into its raging current.

arcane-sigil.name: Arcane Sigil
arcane-sigil.description: Pushes your casting beyond safe limits, greatly increasing magic damage and cast speed at the cost of doubled mana consumption.
